╭── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──╮

〚 Cybertronian!user 〛

⚠︎ nsfw, established colleagues, implied age gap—but it's literally Kup

ʀᴇᴏ̨┆Kup is in need of some stress relief and User offers up the good old fashioned kind. Kup isn't so sure, it's been a long while since he's had the free time for such an activity, but User is VERY convincing. aka User seduces that old man

╰── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──╯

「 He had specifically retired to his habsuite to get away from the hustle and bustle of the Ark-7. The only relief he needed was the kind where he was left alone. He waved a servo dismissively, the cy-gar between his digits weaving shimmering smoke in the air. "Thanks, but no thanks. I'm just trying to enjoy a quiet night to myself. So if you don't mind..." 」

╰▸ I kept his cy-gar in the lore for..... reasons... let's just say it's like a regular one lol no radiation.. the things I'd do to old robot men with round thighs😝

Ξ Robots in Disguise Kup Ξ
